name: Good (Lewd) end La Manchaland (Limbus company)

"We shall call it... La... uhh... LA SEXOLAND!"

[Plot: La Manchaland's grand reopening, but in this Mirror World everything is going well, the Hemobars don't taste horrible and the amount of blood the park gains everyday is enough to stop the bloodfiends from being consumed by their thirst. However, Don Quixote got another of his ingenious ideas, based on a book Bari had accidentally brought, and decided to ask a few of the bloodfiends If they were down for the idea, most respectfully refused, but Dulcinea and Sancho couldn't bring themselves to disappoint Don Quixote when everything was going well in La Manchaland, so they agreed to his idea to "further improve human and bloodfiend coexistence", and Nicolina, when she heard the news instantly jumped in because she could design new outfits, and ones that Sancho would actually have to wear... even if it's a "bit too revealing" and that's a understatement.]
